generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Python program collecting data from physical crane sensors"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalCraneInterface
    base:desc "Data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data collected from physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing operational crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Storage and analysis of operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAnalysis
]

instance HistoricalDataAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical operational data for insights"
]

instance DataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and insights for crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoring, ScenarioSimulation, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane operations for immediate insights"
]

instance ScenarioSimulation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane scenarios for predictive analysis"
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for crane maintenance and efficiency"
]

instance OptimalControl : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjusting system parameters for efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterAdjustment
]

instance ParameterAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of crane parameters to optimize performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensuring consistency between physical and digital models"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelConsistencyCheck
]

instance ModelConsistencyCheck : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation of model accuracy against physical system"
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 Model for architecture visualization using context and container diagrams"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ArchitectureVisualizationEnabler
]

instance ArchitectureVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for visualizing system architecture using C4 Model"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualization
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control using GitHub repositories"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidation
]

instance ContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization for code dissemination and deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidation
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical crane system in laboratory environment"
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for the physical crane"
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for crane operations"
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, Controller
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are generated by the Control Application and transmitted via MQTT to the Physical Crane Interface, which executes them on the physical crane hardware."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system utilizes the C4 Model to visualize and describe its architecture through context and container diagrams, as specified in the documentation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services communicate via MQTT protocol in a publish-subscribe topology using an MQTT Broker, with no details on bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols specified."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "AutomationML standards are used for digital twin modeling in the Air Quality Management exemplar [14], with Microsoft Azure tools implementing the digital twin pipeline. Other exemplars adopt ad-hoc approaches without commercial frameworks."
]
